rationale: Attempt 01 asserted ensures-only facts (e.g. `r1.0 == target_l1_p`) unconditionally, but the proof obligation is an implication `({A}) ==> det_<f>_equal(...)` and Verus has no access to A outside the implication's antecedent — hence the assertion failures. Wrap the prelude in `if ({A}) { ... }` so each conjunct of A becomes a hypothesis inside the branch, then pin every observable of (post_self_, r) to a deterministic function of (pre_self_, inputs) for both runs and chain the pairwise post1/post2 and r1/r2 equalities (lifting `=~=` to `==` via Map/Set/Seq ext-equality) so z3 can match them up inside det_remove_l2_entry_equal.
